reviews.comment:
En 202 y san Martín acá me pusieron agua. .#dontocuato. me tuve que gastar mí jubilación para reparar y cambiar todo la nafta/ agua.xq me. Fallaba el zuzuky fan  en la estación de servicio.de allí...

(Translated by Google)
At 202 and San Martín, they put water in my car. #dontocuato. I had to spend my pension to repair and replace the whole gas/water system because my Suzuki fan was malfunctioning at the gas station. From there...
